---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============================================================
     STUDENT PORTAL PASSWORDS (one per course)
     Econ 467 — Environmental Economics:    econ2026
     Econ 365 — Natural Resource Economics: nre365
     Econ 566 — Grad Environmental:         grad566
     Tell students their course password on the first day of class.
     To change a password: update it here AND in the matching econXXX.qmd file.
     ============================================================ -->
<script>
const COURSE_PASSWORDS = {
  "econ2026": { course: "econ467", url: "econ467.html", label: "Econ 467 — Environmental Economics" },
  "nre365":   { course: "econ365", url: "econ365.html", label: "Econ 365 — Natural Resource Economics" },
  "grad566":  { course: "econ566", url: "econ566.html", label: "Econ 566 — Graduate Environmental Economics" }
};

function checkPassword() {
  const input = document.getElementById('pw-input').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const match = COURSE_PASSWORDS[input];
  if (match) {
    sessionStorage.setItem(match.course + '_auth', input);
    window.location.href = match.url;
  } else {
    document.getElementById('pw-error').style.display = 'block';
  }
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Auto-redirect if already authenticated for any course
  for (const [pwd, info] of Object.entries(COURSE_PASSWORDS)) {
    if (sessionStorage.getItem(info.course + '_auth') === pwd) {
      window.location.href = info.url;
      return;
    }
  }
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') checkPassword();
});
</script>

<div class="content-section">
<div id="password-gate" class="password-gate">
  <h2>Student Portal</h2>
  <p>Enter the course password provided on the first day of class.</p>
  <input type="password" id="pw-input" placeholder="Password" autofocus>
  <button onclick="checkPassword()">Enter</button>
  <div id="pw-error" class="error">Incorrect password. Please try again.</div>
</div>
</div>
```
